ddls:
CREATE TABLE "weather_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather data entry */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the weather station where the data was collected */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the weather data */,
  "tavg" REAL /* Average temperature in degrees Fahrenheit */,
  "depart" REAL /* Departure from the average temperature */,
  "dewpoint" REAL /* Dew point temperature in degrees Fahrenheit */,
  "wetbulb" REAL /* Wet bulb temperature in degrees Fahrenheit */,
  "precip_total" REAL /* Total precipitation in inches */,
  "stn_pressure" REAL /* Station pressure in inches of mercury */,
  "sea_level" REAL /* Sea level pressure in inches of mercury */,
  "result_speed" REAL /* Resultant wind speed in miles per hour */,
  "result_dir" REAL /* Resultant wind direction in degrees */,
  "avg_speed" REAL /* Average wind speed in miles per hour */,
  "sunrise" INTEGER /* Sunrise time in minutes after midnight */,
  "sunset" INTEGER /* Sunset time in minutes after midnight */,
  "codesum_set" TEXT /* Set of weather codes (e.g., 'BR', 'HZ') */,
  "month" TEXT /* Month of the weather data */,
  "collection_method" TEXT /* Method used to collect the data (e.g., manual, automated) */,
  "collection_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of data collection (e.g., daily, hourly) */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., government agency, research institution) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_month FOREIGN KEY ("month") REFERENCES months ("month_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES weather_stations ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_codesum_set FOREIGN KEY ("codesum_set") REFERENCES weather_codes ("code")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the weather station */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the weather station (e.g., City, State, Country) */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the station */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the weather station in feet */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the weather station */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the weather station */,
  "station_type" TEXT /* Type of weather station (e.g., surface, upper-air) */,
  "equipment_used" TEXT /* Equipment used at the station (e.g., anemometer, thermometer) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_codes" (
  "code_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather code */,
  "code" TEXT /* Weather code (e.g., 'BR', 'HZ') */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the weather code */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("code_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_data_codes" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather data entry */,
  "code_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather code */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id", "code_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "months" (
  "month_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each month */,
  "month_name" TEXT /* Name of the month (e.g., January, February) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("month_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., meteorologist, data analyst, admin) */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Organization the user belongs to (e.g., National Weather Service, research institution) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather data entry being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "query_parameters" TEXT /* Query parameters used to filter the data (e.g., date range, location) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather data entry the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the data file (e.g., CSV, JSON) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "readme_files" (
  "readme_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each readme file */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather data entry the readme file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the readme file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the readme file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the readme file (e.g., PDF, TXT) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("readme_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_readme_files_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data version */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather data entry */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "changes_made" TEXT /* Description of changes made in this version */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of changes made in this version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality" (
  "quality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quality entry */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather data entry */,
  "quality_score" REAL /* Quality score (e.g., 0.0 to 1.0) */,
  "validation_status" TEXT /* Validation status (e.g., validated, pending, rejected) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes on the quality and validation process */,
  "validation_date" TEXT /* Date the validation was performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quality_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "realtime_data_feeds" (
  "feed_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each real-time data feed */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather station providing the feed */,
  "feed_name" TEXT /* Name of the feed (e.g., Current Conditions, Forecast) */,
  "feed_url" TEXT /* URL of the feed */,
  "update_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of updates (e.g., every 5 minutes, every hour) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feed_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_realtime_data_feeds_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES weather_stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "historical_data_archives" (
  "archive_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical data archive */,
  "archive_name" TEXT /* Name of the archive (e.g., Daily Summaries, Hourly Observations) */,
  "archive_path" TEXT /* Path to the archive */,
  "archive_size" REAL /* Size of the archive in MB */,
  "update_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of updates (e.g., daily, weekly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("archive_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each research team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the research team */,
  "team_lead" TEXT /* Lead researcher of the team */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Organization the team belongs to (e.g., university, research institution) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_memberships" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the research team */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the team (e.g., team lead, researcher, collaborator) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "team_id")
)
